constants.name: Weather: wind penalty (≤10 mph)
constants.provenance: Fitted OLS on 2019-23 outdoor team-games (n=1,556), t=-3.4. Replaced the guessed 30mph-max shape.

constants.name: Weather: precipitation penalty
constants.provenance: The dominant weather term (t=-5.9). Cold FAILED the t≥2 bar and was dropped.

constants.name: Opponent DB-out pass boost
constants.provenance: Fitted 2019-23 (n=2,557 team-games, t=+2.0). Front-7/LB and OWN O-line outs cleared NOTHING and ship no multiplier.

constants.name: Anytime-TD red-zone blend weight
constants.provenance: Walk-forward log-loss grid 2019-23 (n=16,871). Opponent RZ factor FAILED the same fit → ML-feature only.

constants.name: Game-script PROE split coefficient
constants.provenance: OLS 2019-23 (t=+3.1). Opponent-pace VOLUME term FAILED (t=-0.3) and is not shipped.

constants.name: Recency weight (EWM span)
constants.provenance: Walk-forward next-game MAE sweep 2019-25: EWM span-8 beats flat-8 (production) AND ewm-4 in ALL 7 markets, 6/6 seasons each (pooled 5.379→5.293). drop_rest cleaning wins/ties per market; drop_injury measured WORSE (kept out).

constants.name: Recency: drop rest/meaningless prior games
constants.provenance: Same sweep — zero-weighting a team's playoff-fate-settled games improves every market. Extended to opponent-defense factors, team pace, ML frame, player-learning ledger, calibration & correlation (§8.4).

principle: Every constant above is MEASURED from this project's own history with a printed t-stat / MAE verdict. If a candidate effect didn't clear the bar (t≥2 or consistent OOS gain) it was rejected, not shipped — several were (garbage-time filter, opp-pace, cold weather, O-line multiplier, drop_injury).
